definition: EM economies segment into three AI-relevant categories: (A) supply chain beneficiaries (TWD, KRW), (B) services-threatened (PHP, INR, BDT), and (C) commodity-adjacent. Directional divergence already observable (TWD/KRW outperforming PHP/BDT since 2023). FDI flow data supports segmentation. But boundaries are fuzzy (India spans A and B), operationalization requires unavailable data, and no independent corroboration exists.
evidence: Directional divergence observable: TWD/KRW outperforming PHP/BDT since 2023
open_questions: Can the fuzzy boundaries (India spanning segments) be resolved with additional data?
What FX factor model modifications would operationalize this segmentation?
Does commodity-adjacent EM require sub-segmentation by AI energy demand exposure?
